cards.text: Scale your operations with our AI-powered solutions designed for flexibility and adaptability. Our architecture grows with your business, enabling seamless expansion and innovation.

cards.text: Direct contracts, exclusive terms, and a reliable long-term cooperation model for your business.

hero.title: Promoting food industry leaders to global markets
hero.text: We create a space where quality products meet real business opportunities. Through our showroom and structured approach, we simplify procurement, build trust, and turn connections into long-term partnerships.

company.title: About Good Food Russia.
company.text: Good Food Russia is a curated platform connecting manufacturers of high-quality products with distributors, retailers, and HoReCa partners in international markets. We specialize in showcasing reliable brands through a structured, transparent, and efficient business model. Our goal is to simplify procurement, reduce risks, and build long-term partnerships in the food industry. We operate through a unique showroom format where products are not just displayed, they can be tested, evaluated, and prepared for real business integration.

mission.title: Mission.
mission.text: Our mission is to connect manufacturers and buyers by creating a reliable, efficient, and transparent environment for cooperation.

showroom.title: Visit our showroom
showroom.text: The Good Food Russia platform helps you evaluate a product not from a catalogue, but in a real environment: get acquainted with the assortment, discuss supply details, and make faster cooperation decisions.

process.title: How it works
process.text: We make the process simple and transparent, from the first introduction to products to supply coordination and long-term partnership.

steps.title: Assortment selection
steps.text: You explore categories and brands that fit your market, sales format, and customer expectations.

steps.title: Sample review
steps.text: You evaluate product quality, packaging, and specifications before making a commercial decision.

steps.title: Negotiations and terms
steps.text: We align volumes, prices, documents, and operational details together with the manufacturer and your team.

steps.title: Partnership launch
steps.text: We move to deliveries, support product integration, and maintain stable ongoing cooperation.

team.title: A strong team is the foundation of our success
team.text: Experienced specialists in product, logistics, and partner sales help turn brand interest into a clear and reliable business process.

documents.title: Documents and certificates
documents.text: Official documents and certificates confirming product quality and compliance.

faq.title: Have questions?
faq.text: Didn't find the information you need? Contact us, we will be happy to help you choose.

accordions.question: How do I place an order?
accordions.answer: Contact our team to discuss the assortment, volumes, and cooperation format. We will help you select products and prepare the next steps to launch procurement.

accordions.question: How long does delivery take?
accordions.answer: Timing depends on the product category, batch volume, and supply route. After the details are agreed, we create a clear schedule and support the process until the products are received.

accordions.question: Can I place a preorder?
accordions.answer: Yes, we can arrange preorders for selected product categories and fix the key terms for volumes and timelines in advance.

accordions.question: What payment methods are available?
accordions.answer: The payment format is discussed individually depending on the cooperation model, order volume, and agreed commercial terms.

accordions.question: Is there a minimum order amount?
accordions.answer: The minimum volume depends on the specific manufacturer and product category. We will suggest the optimal entry format after you choose the assortment you are interested in.

accordions.question: How can I contact support?
accordions.answer: You can leave a request through the website or write directly to our team. We will get back to you to answer your questions and help you choose the right solution.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.text: Contact the GooFood team if you have questions, suggestions, or want to learn more about our service. We are always happy to help.

mediaIndex.shareText: Share this news with friends or save the link to read later.

contactsModal.title: Contact us
contactsModal.text: Leave your contact details and the GooFood team will help with orders, delivery, or any questions you may have.
contactsModal.name: Your name
contactsModal.successText: We have received your contact details and will get in touch soon.

hero.title: Services that deliver results
hero.text: A comprehensive approach, trusted partners, and efficient processes for the steady growth of your business

reasons.title: What we do for your business
reasons.text: From sourcing and product selection to negotiations and logistics, our services are built into a unified system that helps you achieve results quickly and efficiently

cards.title: Showroom demonstration
cards.text: Evaluate products in person: study materials, build quality, and execution details. Our specialists will explain the specifications in detail and help you make an informed decision before purchase.

cards.title: Product sourcing and selection
cards.text: We choose the best solutions for your goals and budget. We analyze needs, compare options, and offer only the products that truly match your requirements.

cards.title: Sample requests
cards.text: Order product samples to personally verify quality and ensure they meet your expectations. This allows you to make a confident decision before placing the main order.

cards.title: B2B negotiation support
cards.text: We support you at every stage of negotiations, from discussing terms to closing the deal. We help build beneficial, transparent, and long-term partnerships.

cards.title: Import and logistics
cards.text: We organize the full supply cycle, from order processing to delivery to your warehouse. We control every stage, ensuring reliability, transparency, and on-time execution.

cta.title: Discuss supplies
cta.text: Contact our team to align volumes and cooperation terms.

faq.title: Have questions?
faq.text: Didn't find the information you need? Contact us, we will be happy to help you choose.
